authors.author: William J. Gaither
William J. Gaither
Seit nach Gottes Reich ich trachte

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Since I started for the Kingdom, Since my life He controls, Since I gave my heart to Jesus, The longer I serve Him, The sweeter He grows.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The longer I serve Him, the sweeter He grows, The more that I love Him, more love He bestows; Each day is like heaven, my heart overflows, The longer I serve Him, the sweeter He grows.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ev'ry need He is supplying, Plenteous grace He bestows; Ev'ry day my way gets brighter, The longer I serve Him, The sweeter He grows.
